candidates.primary_principle: Content must be perceivable, operable, understandable, and robust (POUR) across visual, motor, and cognitive variation; AA conformance is the legal floor in most jurisdictions.
candidates.citation_form: W3C (2023). Web Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.2. W3C Recommendation.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Web accessibility depends not only on accessible content but also on accessible web browsers and other user agents. Authoring tools also have an important role in web accessibility. For an overview of how these components of web development and interaction work together, see:

candidates.primary_principle: Use native semantics first; when ARIA is necessary, implement expected roles, states, properties, and keyboard interaction patterns.
candidates.citation_form: W3C WAI. ARIA Authoring Practices Guide. w3.org/WAI/ARIA/apg.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Accessibility resources free online from the international standards organization: W3C Web Accessibility Initiative (WAI).

candidates.source_name: Easy Checks - A First Review of Web Accessibility
candidates.primary_principle: Run quick human checks for title, alt text, headings, contrast, resize, keyboard access, and forms before deeper audits.
candidates.citation_form: W3C WAI. Easy Checks - A First Review of Web Accessibility. w3.org/WAI.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Accessibility resources free online from the international standards organization: W3C Web Accessibility Initiative (WAI).

candidates.primary_principle: Embed accessibility into product planning, design, development, verification, and launch rather than treating it as a late audit.
candidates.citation_form: IBM Accessibility. Equal Access Toolkit. ibm.com/able/toolkit.

candidates.primary_principle: Verify text and background contrast ratios rather than relying on visual intuition.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Web accessibility testing can be difficult! The experts at WebAIM can audit your web site and provide a detailed report to help you remediate accessibility and WCAG compliance issues.

candidates.primary_principle: Solve for one, extend to many: constraints experienced by disabled people can reveal broadly useful design improvements.
candidates.extracted_excerpt: Microsoft Inclusive Design is a practice that anyone who creates and manages products and services can use to build more inclusive experiences for everyone. Get the principles, guidebooks, workshop tools, videos, and many more free resources.
